response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff/Senior Software Developer with over 15 years of professional experience across fullstack, embedded, and infrastructure domains — making him severely overqualified for a Junior/Mid-Level entry-level role. His technical profile maps well to the stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, LLM tooling), and his Berlin location satisfies the on-site requirement. However, the seniority mismatch creates high attrition risk, almost certain salary misalignment, and a poor fit for a role explicitly scoped at entry level. PostgreSQL is also absent from his listed experience, with only generic SQL, MongoDB, and MySQL mentioned.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js expertise validated across multiple production-scale roles
Covers several nice-to-haves outright: LLM/AI agent integration, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK
Berlin-based with a demonstrated culture of clean architecture, TDD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: Grossly overqualified — Staff/Senior with 15+ years against an entry-level Junior/Mid scope
No explicit PostgreSQL experience; databases mentioned are MongoDB, MySQL, and unspecified SQL
Compensation expectations and career trajectory needs are structurally incompatible with this role's level
